data.title: Jack in the Box Inc urges shareholders to vote for all 10 director nominees recommended by ISS; Annual Meeting on Feb 27, 2026.
data.description: SAN DIEGO-- Jack in the Box Inc. announced that they have sent out a letter to shareholders regarding their upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders set for February 27, 2026. In the communication, the Company pointed out that Institutional Shareholder Services, an independent proxy advisory firm, has advised shareholders to vote in favor of all 10 of the Company’s director nominees. This recommendation is a significant development leading up to the Annual Meeting where crucial decisions will be made for the future of the Company.

data.title: Harbor Compliance gets majority growth investment from Bregal Sagemount, with terms undisclosed. New CEO appointed.
data.description: A growth investment has been received by Harbor Compliance, a company specializing in entity compliance solutions for nonprofit and mid-market corporate clients. The investment comes from Bregal Sagemount, a prominent private equity firm, indicating a significant development for the company. Founded in 2012 and based in Lancaster, Pennsylvania, Harbor Compliance offers its services through a SaaS platform. The exact terms of the investment were not disclosed, maintaining a level of confidentiality around the transaction.

data.title: Simbian introduces AI Pentest Agent for enterprise security, a first in the industry for fast and contextual assessments.
data.description: The introduction of the innovative Simbian AI Pentest Agent marks a milestone in the industry, as it becomes the first solution to offer on-demand security assessments at machine speed while integrating critical business context. Developed in Mountain View, California, this cutting-edge technology is set to revolutionize the field of AI with its unmatched capabilities.

data.title: RingCentral partners with OpenAI to enhance enterprise-grade voice AI capabilities for businesses. #AI
data.description: A technology company based in Belmont, California, recently announced a collaboration with OpenAI to enhance their voice artificial intelligence services aimed at businesses. RingCentral, known for its innovative solutions, will be incorporating OpenAI's advanced technology to improve their enterprise-level voice AI capabilities. This partnership is expected to bring about significant advancements in the field, ultimately benefiting businesses utilizing these services.

data.title: M Science launches AI investment copilot Maddie, transforming research with real-time dialogue. AI at intersection of data and workflows.
data.description: Today, M Science unveiled Maddie, an innovative multi-agent AI tool for investment analysis. Maddie is tailored to function at the point where exclusive data meets institutional operations, reshaping the conventional research approach from a fixed consumption model to an interactive, up-to-the-minute conversation. The pivotal issue in today's data-rich environment is no longer access to data for gaining an edge (alpha), but rather attention management. Maddie tackles this hurdle by amalgamating M Science’s expertise.

data.title: NFSG's Ken Mahoney discusses AI disruption and interest rates on Bloomberg Markets to a global audience in Boca Raton.
data.description: Ken Mahoney from NFSG in Boca Raton, Florida provided live market commentary on Bloomberg Markets, focusing on AI disruption and interest rates. The discussion reached a global audience, highlighting the increasing relevance of AI technology in the financial industry.

data.title: Nintendo Download: Star Trek game Star Trek: Voyager - Across the Unknown released on Nintendo Switch, based on the iconic USS Voyager, manage ship & crew resources. #NintendoSwitch
data.description: This week, Nintendo released new content on the Nintendo eShop for the Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2. One of the highlights is Star Trek: Voyager – Across the Unknown, a survival strategy game where players take control of the U.S.S. Voyager starship. The game challenges players to manage the ship and its resources while making tough decisions to ensure the crew's survival. Star Trek: Voyager – Across the Unknown is currently available for purchase on the Nintendo eShop.

data.title: Evolv partners with Shell Energy Stadium Houston for weapon detection tech, improving security at live events.
data.description: Located in Waltham, Massachusetts, Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVLV) has recently partnered with Shell Energy Stadium, the home venue for Houston Dynamo FC and Houston Dash soccer teams. This collaboration involves a multi-year subscription agreement for Evolv Express®, the company's AI-driven security solution. The agreement aims to enhance safety measures within the stadium by detecting concealed weapons. The partnership marks a significant step for Evolv Technologies as they continue to innovate in the security technology sector.

data.title: OneRail opens new office in Kraków, Poland for global engineering operations, supporting growth in last mile delivery solutions.
data.description: A company specializing in AI-native last mile fulfillment and delivery orchestration solutions, OneRail, has recently unveiled the establishment of a new office in Kraków, Poland. This move signifies a substantial growth in its global engineering presence. The expansion aims to bolster support for the firm's expanding product and technology teams due to the escalating need for instantaneous, streamlined last mile delivery services by businesses. The new office in Poland is set to cater to these requirements and will contribute to the company's overall operations.

data.title: Enveric Biosciences released data on EB-003's receptor engagement assay, showing activation of Gq- and β-arrestin via 5-HT₂A receptor.
data.description: Enveric Biosciences, a biotechnology company listed on NASDAQ as ENVB, headquartered in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has released new findings regarding its primary drug candidate, EB-003. This candidate has been shown to trigger signaling pathways associated with the 5-HT₂A receptor, specifically activating Gq- and β-arrestin-mediated mechanisms. The company focuses on developing innovative small-molecule therapies for psychiatric and neurological conditions. Previous research conducted by various independent sources and published in peer-reviewed journals has corroborated these latest mechanistic insights.

data.title: Cizzle Brands Corp introduces SnakStars™ Sport Bites: Nut-free, high-protein snack for kids, with 16g protein/bag.
data.description: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTCQB: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) unveiled SnakStars™ Sport Bites™, a novel high-protein, high-fiber snack aimed at enhancing health and wellness. This new product caters to the need for improved options in children's snacks, offering 16 grams of protein per bag. Designed for active families, SnakStars™ Sport Bites™ provide a healthier alternative to conventional granola bars.

data.title: EPAM Systems stock hits 52-week low due to cautious 2026 outlook despite Q4 beat. Sales reached $1.41B, up 12.8% Y/Y. Adjusted EPS rose to $3.26. Operating cash flow increased to $282.9M. Share repurchases worth $223.5M in Q4.
data.description: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) saw a decline in its stock despite exceeding expectations in both fourth-quarter earnings and revenue. The company reported a 12.8% increase in sales year-over-year, reaching $1.41 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.39 billion. Revenues grew by 5.6% organically and in constant currency compared to the fourth quarter of 2024. Adjusted earnings per share rose to $3.26 from $2.84 the previous year, exceeding the estimated $3.16. Adjusted operating income for the quarter escalated to $230.0 million from $208.2 million year-over-year, with margins decreasing from 16.7% to 16.3%. Operating cash flow for the quarter notably rose to $282.9 million from $130.3 million a year ago. As of December 31, 2025, the company's cash, cash equivalents, and restricted cash totaled $1.301 billion, marking a 0.9% increase compared to the previous year. In terms of share repurchases, EPAM bought back 1.16 million shares for $223.5 million in the fourth quarter.

data.title: Bundesbank head urges for euro-pegged stablecoins to counter dollarization, as ECB member suggests wholesale CBDC.
data.description: Joachim Nagel, a member of the ECB Governing Council, has suggested that a wholesale Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC) and stablecoins pegged to the euro could potentially strengthen the euro's standing on the global stage. Nagel's proposal implies that creating a CBDC and stablecoins tied to the euro could increase the currency's relevance and influence in international transactions. The mention of a wholesale CBDC and euro-pegged stablecoins in Nagel's argument indicates a strategy to enhance the euro's presence in the global market. Such initiatives could potentially impact the euro's role in international finance significantly, according to Nagel. This proposal underscores the potential benefits of utilizing digital currencies and stablecoins in bolstering the euro's position, offering new possibilities for enhancing the currency's international reach and impact. Nagel's perspective sheds light on potential strategies that could elevate the euro's prominence in the global economy, emphasizing the importance of innovation and digital solutions in shaping the currency's future trajectory. His views on the significance of wholesale CBDC and euro-pegged stablecoins highlight avenues for strengthening the euro's standing in the international financial landscape.
Virtuix to ring closing bell at Nasdaq on March 4, 2026.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop post-resistance; S&P 500 hits resistance, Walmart down on weak guidance, and Carvana dived.
data.description: After a bounce on Wednesday, futures dropped as stocks extended losses. The S&P 500 faced resistance, while Walmart's shares declined due to poor guidance. Carvana also experienced a significant dive. The Dow Jones Futures fell following the resistance of the S&P 500. Walmart and Carvana witnessed substantial declines.

data.title: Bitcoin at $66,000; Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin drop. Bitcoin ETFs -$133.3 million outflows, Ethereum ETFs -$41.8 million. Meme coins fell 4.1% in 24 hours, market cap at $34.4 billion. Trader warns of bearish outlook if Bitcoin fails to meet $70,800 mark.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently priced at $66,000, with Bitcoin ETFs experiencing net outflows of $133.3 million on Wednesday. Ethereum ETFs also saw net outflows of $41.8 million. Other cryptocurrency prices include Ethereum at $1,953.67, Solana at $81.64, XRP at $1.41, Dogecoin at $0.09784, and Shiba Inu at $0.056236. The meme coin sector dropped by 4.1% in the last 24 hours, reaching a market cap of $34.4 billion. Trader Dami-Defi commented that if Bitcoin records a fifth consecutive red weekly candle and fails to surpass $70,800 in a weekly close, the sentiment could turn bearish. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Praxis Precision Medicine Q4 earnings missed estimates at -13.64%, EPS $-3.5 vs. $-3.08. Revenue down $7.46M yoy.
data.description: Praxis Precision Medicine (NASDAQ: PRAX) disclosed its Q4 financial results on Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 07:30 AM. The report revealed that the company fell short of anticipated earnings by -13.64%, posting an EPS of $-3.5 compared to the estimated $-3.08. Additionally, revenue saw a decrease of $7.46 million from the corresponding period in the previous year. For a detailed analysis of the earnings in the last quarter, visit a financial news website.
